title: Book of the Dead, Spell 184: Being at the Side of Osiris
source: Papyrus of Ani; Papyrus of Nu; various papyri
description: Spell 184 of the Egyptian Book of the Dead — the most extensive collection of funerary texts from any ancient civilization.
introduction: Spell 184 of the Egyptian Book of the Dead — the most extensive collection of funerary texts from any ancient civilization.

translation.text: From the Book of the Dead, Spell 184: 'Being at the Side of Osiris.' This spell empowered the deceased to navigate the dangers of the underworld and achieve eternal life among the gods. The full text was inscribed on papyrus and placed in the tomb.
